title: An Active Type IV Secretion System Encoded by the F Plasmid Sensitizes Escherichia coli to Bile Salts
summary: The paper discusses the filamentous DNA bacteriophages M13 and M13K07 in the context of their infection of Escherichia coli F+ strains and the resulting sensitivity to bile salts. No explicit morphological or structural characterization (e.g., TEM images, dimensions, family classification) of the phages is provided in the text.
